title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・悲願、成就す

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen beats out Mejiro Ryan and the
rest of the competition, achieving her ultimate
goal in the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Filled with emotion, she announces her victory
and expresses her gratitude to everyone in her
family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing her words, the crowd continues to cheer
for her a while longer.
